---
title: "semantic.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/intel/semantic.ts"
loc: 116
complexity: 16
logic_score: 0.85
style_score: 4.02
intel_score: 3.72
overall_score: 2.65
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [getParser](file://../parser.ts)
- [TreeSitter](file://../parser.ts)
- [crawlRepository](file://../crawler.ts)
- [*](file://node:fs/promises)
- [*](file://node:path)

### Exports
- `Map`
- `SemanticIndexer`
- `files`
- `results`
- `symbols`
- `data`
- `absPath`
- `code`
- `getParser`
- `tree`
- `symbols`
- `patterns`
- `query`
- `matches`
- `absPath`
- `code`
- `getParser`
- `tree`
- `dependencies`
- `symbolsOccurred`
- `stack`
- `node`
- `paths`
- `i`
- `child`
